_meta.name: GLOBALKINECT_BRAND_TOKENS
_meta.authority: Website tokens are master. Platform and all other surfaces conform to this file.
notes: Never edit the platform or email tokens independently. Edit this file, then propagate.
CSS custom properties use bare HSL values (no hsl() wrapper) — Tailwind applies the wrapper.
Hex values are provided for non-Tailwind contexts (PDFs, emails, native mobile, PowerPoint).
PDF primary colour is accent blue (#2B7DD8) — confirmed decision April 2026.
Platform primary colour migrates from teal (#1B9E9E) to navy (#1F2D3D) — confirmed April 2026.
Font is Plus Jakarta Sans on all surfaces. Platform currently uses system font — migration required.

navy.usage: Primary brand colour. Hero backgrounds, footer, primary buttons, headings on light backgrounds.

navy_deep.usage: Deepest navy. Platform sidebar background, footer bottom strip.

navy_light.usage: Lighter navy. Sidebar hover states, secondary nav items.

blue.usage: Accent / interactive. CTA buttons, links, focus rings, active states, PDF table headers.

blue_light.usage: Light blue. Hover states on blue elements, secondary highlights.

blue_pale.usage: Very light blue background. Feature highlight boxes, info banners, AEO blocks.

white.usage: Page background, card background, text on dark surfaces.

grey_50.usage: Near-white. Alternate section backgrounds, table zebra rows.

grey_100.usage: Secondary section backgrounds, muted backgrounds, input backgrounds.

grey_300.usage: Medium grey. Placeholder text on very light backgrounds.

text_primary.usage: Primary body text, headings on white backgrounds.

status._note: Status colours are functional, not brand. Do not change these to match brand colours.

success.usage: Success states, approved status, positive indicators.

warning.usage: Warning states, pending items, deadline alerts.

error.usage: Error states, rejected status, destructive actions.

map_regions._note: Used in CoverageMap.tsx on website. Do not alter — these are geographic convention colours.

pdf._note: PDF table headers use accent blue (#2B7DD8). Decision confirmed April 2026. Replaces teal (#0D9488).

platform_sidebar._note: Platform sidebar uses a dark surface. These tokens replace the old dark-teal sidebar (#1B3332).

background.usage: Sidebar background. Replaced teal (#1B3332) with navy deep.

active_highlight.usage: Active item indicator line and icon highlight. Accent blue.

muted_text.usage: Sidebar group labels and secondary items.

font_family.source: Google Fonts via next/font (website) / direct import (platform)

platform_body._note: Platform uses text-sm as base body size. Website uses 1rem. Both correct for their context.

border_radius._note: Website base radius is 8px (0.5rem). Platform base radius is 10px (0.625rem). Platform will align to website.

shadows._note: Platform currently uses Tailwind defaults (shadow-sm, shadow-md, shadow-lg). Migrate to gk-* tokens.

button_accent.usage: Primary CTA. Book a Demo. All conversion actions.

standard.usage: Navbar, light backgrounds, documents, email headers

inverse.usage: Footer, dark/navy backgrounds, platform sidebar header

platform_changes_required.impact: All primary buttons, active states, progress bars, switches, focus rings

platform_changes_required.what: Sidebar background — dark teal to navy deep
Sidebar active item — teal to navy
platform_changes_required.impact: Sidebar hover and active item backgrounds

platform_changes_required.what: Sidebar primary highlight — teal to blue
platform_changes_required.impact: Active item indicator and icon highlight colour
Accent/highlight backgrounds, hover states on outline buttons

platform_changes_required.what: Accent foreground — dark teal to navy
Ring / focus colour — teal to blue
platform_changes_required.impact: All focus rings on inputs, buttons, selects
All PDF exports — payslips, payroll packs, invoices, reports

platform_changes_required.what: Font — system font to Plus Jakarta Sans
platform_changes_required.where: frontend/src/index.css — font-family on body, plus Google Fonts import
platform_changes_required.impact: All text in the platform frontend
All cards, dialogs, inputs, buttons (1 token change, cascades automatically)

migration.dark_mode_note: Platform implements dark mode. Dark mode tokens also need updating to maintain consistency. Primary dark mode primary should shift from teal (#22B8B8) to blue (#2B7DD8 or lighter variant). Update --primary in .dark class.
files_to_touch: frontend/src/index.css — all CSS custom property changes
frontend/index.html or main entry — add Plus Jakarta Sans Google Fonts import
files_not_to_touch: Any component .tsx files — changes cascade from CSS custom properties automatically
tailwind.config.js — no changes needed if tokens are CSS-var based
Any backend files — no visual changes

usage_instructions.claude_chat: Reference this file when making any brand, colour, or design decision. This file overrides any conflicting values in individual surface files.
usage_instructions.claude_code_website: Read this file before touching any copy, colour, CTA, or meta tag. Website tokens are already correct — this file confirms them.
usage_instructions.claude_code_platform: Read this file before any UI work. Apply the migration section. Every teal token gets replaced. CSS custom properties only — do not touch component files.
usage_instructions.claude_code_social_engine: Reference brand voice and ICP files alongside this. Colour tokens are not relevant to the social engine.
usage_instructions.email_templates: Use hex values from colour.core and colour.pdf sections. Font is Plus Jakarta Sans — embed or specify fallback.
usage_instructions.powerpoint_decks: Navy (#1F2D3D) headers, accent blue (#2B7DD8) highlights, white slide backgrounds, Plus Jakarta Sans.
usage_instructions.new_conversations: Share GLOBALKINECT_BRAND.md, GLOBALKINECT_ICP.md, and this file. Three files replace any re-briefing.
